overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing the protagonist Geralt running through a rainy forest trail at night. The character moves steadily along a dirt path surrounded by dense trees and grassland, transitioning to open fields with sunflowers before approaching a wooden house where hostile NPCs are visible near the entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest trail in heavy rain

agents.ego_description: Geralt running steadily along the narrow forest path with swords on his back, rain falling heavily around him

entered.detail: muddy trail winding through the forest with visible rain impact
tall evergreen trees forming a dense wall along the path
tall evergreen trees lining the right side of the trail
lush green grass and undergrowth alongside the muddy path
green grass slope rising up from the trail edge

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark rainy night in a dense forest. Geralt runs along a narrow dirt trail flanked by tall pine trees and thick grass. The heavy rain creates a hazy atmosphere with limited visibility, and the path winds gently through the enclosed woodland environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland trail with scattered trees

events.description: dense forest opens up into wider grassland with scattered trees
cluster of yellow sunflowers becomes visible on the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: continuing to run as the terrain opens into rolling grassland with fewer trees

entered.detail: cluster of tall yellow sunflowers growing beside the trail
distinctive white-barked tree standing alone in the grassland

segments.scene_description: The forest gives way to open grassland as the path continues through rolling terrain. The rain persists but the sky becomes more visible overhead. A cluster of sunflowers appears on the left, marking the transition from dense woodland to meadow. The character maintains a steady running pace along the winding dirt trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural house approach with hostile figures

events.description: wooden house with lit windows comes into view at the end of the path
hostile NPCs spotted near the house, indicating imminent combat encounter

agents.ego_description: approaching the house while spotting enemies ahead, preparing for potential combat

notable_agents.action: hostile figure standing near the house entrance with weapon drawn
enemy running toward the house from the left side

entered.detail: rustic wooden house with warm light glowing from windows
flickering orange firelight illuminating the area near the house

segments.scene_description: The path leads toward a wooden house with lit windows standing in the open field. As the character approaches, hostile figures become visible near the building, suggesting an impending combat encounter. The rain continues to fall as the warm artificial light from the house contrasts with the cool blue night, and enemies are seen moving near the structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy nocturnal forest that gradually opens into a wide meadow centered around a remote house. It begins with Geralt running along a narrow dirt trail enclosed by tall pine trees and thick grass under a heavy, hazy downpour. As the path winds forward, the dense woodland gives way to rolling grassland, where the sky becomes more visible and clusters of sunflowers emerge along the trail. The scene then expands across the open field toward a wooden house with glowing windows, creating a sharp contrast between the warm artificial light and the cool blue night. Finally, the camera closes in on the structure as hostile figures appear near the entrance, signaling an impending encounter.
